evidence: standards/enterprise/mobile-security.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: A less restrictive accessibility or access-control policy requires Security Owner approval tied to the exact data class, operational need, owner, expiry, and mitigation.
statement: Credentials and small security-sensitive values use Keychain with the least-permissive accessibility, access control, and synchronization behavior compatible with their DATA-CLASS-001 class and documented runtime needs.
